info.name: Gym Webservice API
info.description: Comprehensive API tests for Member and Enrollment modules

exec: pm.test('Status code is 201 Created', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Response contains memberId', function () { pm.expect(response.memberId).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Response contains correct fullName', function () { pm.expect(response.fullName).to.eql('Test User'); });
pm.test('Response contains correct email', function () { pm.expect(response.email).to.eql('test.user@example.com'); });
pm.test('Response contains membershipStatus ACTIVE', function () { pm.expect(response.membershipStatus).to.eql('ACTIVE'); });
pm.collectionVariables.set('createdMemberId', response.memberId);
pm.test('Status code is 409 Conflict', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(409); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error message indicates duplicate', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('already exists'); });
pm.test('Error field is Conflict', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Conflict'); });
pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error message indicates plan not found', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('Membership plan not found'); });
pm.test('Status code is 400 Bad Request', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error indicates invalid membership period', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Bad Request'); });
pm.test('Status code is 400 Bad Request', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error field is Bad Request', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Bad Request'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200 OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Response is an array', function () { pm.expect(response).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Array contains members', function () { pm.expect(response.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

pm.test('Each member has required fields', function () { response.forEach(function(member) { pm.expect(member).to.have.property('memberId'); pm.expect(member).to.have.property('fullName'); pm.expect(member).to.have.property('email'); }); });
pm.test('Status code is 200 OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Returned member ID matches request', function () { pm.expect(response.memberId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('createdMemberId')); });

pm.test('Response contains all member fields', function () { pm.expect(response).to.have.property('memberId'); pm.expect(response).to.have.property('fullName'); pm.expect(response).to.have.property('dateOfBirth'); pm.expect(response).to.have.property('email'); pm.expect(response).to.have.property('phone'); pm.expect(response).to.have.property('membershipPlanId'); pm.expect(response).to.have.property('membershipStatus'); });

item.name: Get Member By ID - Not Found

exec: pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error message indicates member not found', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('Member not found'); });
pm.test('Error field is Not Found', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Not Found'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200 OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Member name was updated', function () { pm.expect(response.fullName).to.eql('Test User Updated'); });
pm.test('Member email was updated', function () { pm.expect(response.email).to.eql('test.user.updated@example.com'); });
pm.test('Member ID remains unchanged', function () { pm.expect(response.memberId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('createdMemberId')); });
pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error indicates member not found', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('Member not found'); });
pm.test('Status code is 204 No Content', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });
pm.test('Response body is empty', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.be.empty; });
pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Deleted member is not found', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Not Found'); });
pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error indicates member not found', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('Member not found'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200 OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Response has _embedded with enrollments', function () { pm.expect(response).to.have.property('_embedded'); });
pm.test('Response has HATEOAS _links', function () { pm.expect(response).to.have.property('_links'); pm.expect(response._links).to.have.property('self'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200 OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Response contains enrollmentId', function () { pm.expect(response.enrollmentId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('existingEnrollmentId')); });
pm.test('Response contains memberId', function () { pm.expect(response.memberId).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Response contains registeredClasses array', function () { pm.expect(response.registeredClasses).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Response has HATEOAS self link', function () { pm.expect(response._links).to.have.property('self'); });
pm.test('Response has HATEOAS enrollments link', function () { pm.expect(response._links).to.have.property('enrollments'); });
pm.test('Response has HATEOAS member-enrollments link', function () { pm.expect(response._links).to.have.property('member-enrollments'); });

pm.test('Each registered class has UUID classSessionId', function () { const uuidRegex = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i; response.registeredClasses.forEach(function(item) { pm.expect(item.classSessionId).to.match(uuidRegex); }); });

item.name: Get Enrollment By ID - Not Found

exec: pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error message indicates enrollment not found', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('Enrollment not found'); });
pm.test('Error field is Not Found', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Not Found'); });

item.name: Get Enrollments By Member ID - Success

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200 OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Response has HATEOAS _links', function () { pm.expect(response).to.have.property('_links'); });
pm.test('Response has self link', function () { pm.expect(response._links).to.have.property('self'); });
pm.test('Response has all-enrollments link', function () { pm.expect(response._links).to.have.property('all-enrollments'); });
pm.test('Status code is 201 Created', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Response contains enrollmentId', function () { pm.expect(response.enrollmentId).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Response contains correct memberId', function () { pm.expect(response.memberId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('activeMemberId')); });

pm.test('Response contains registeredClasses with new enrollment', function () { const testClassId = pm.collectionVariables.get('testClassSessionId'); const enrolledClass = response.registeredClasses.find(c => c.classSessionId === testClassId); pm.expect(enrolledClass).to.not.be.undefined; pm.expect(enrolledClass.enrollmentStatus).to.eql('ENROLLED'); });

pm.test('ClassSessionId is a valid UUID', function () { const testClassId = pm.collectionVariables.get('testClassSessionId'); const uuidRegex = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i; pm.expect(testClassId).to.match(uuidRegex); });
pm.test('Response has HATEOAS links', function () { pm.expect(response._links).to.have.property('self'); });
pm.collectionVariables.set('createdEnrollmentId', response.enrollmentId);

item.name: Enroll Member In Same Class - Duplicate

exec: pm.test('Status code is 409 Conflict', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(409); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error message indicates already enrolled', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('already enrolled'); });
pm.test('Error field is Conflict', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Conflict'); });
pm.test('Status code is 403 Forbidden', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(403); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error message indicates invalid membership', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('valid membership'); });
pm.test('Error field is Forbidden', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Forbidden'); });
pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error message indicates member not found', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('Member not found'); });
pm.test('Error field is Not Found', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Not Found'); });
pm.test('Status code is 400 Bad Request', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error field is Bad Request', function () { pm.expect(response.error).to.eql('Bad Request'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200 OK', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Response contains enrollmentId', function () { pm.expect(response.enrollmentId).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Enrollment status is CANCELLED for the class', function () { const testClassId = pm.collectionVariables.get('testClassSessionId'); const cancelledClass = response.registeredClasses.find(c => c.classSessionId === testClassId); pm.expect(cancelledClass).to.not.be.undefined; pm.expect(cancelledClass.enrollmentStatus).to.eql('CANCELLED'); });
pm.test('Response has HATEOAS links', function () { pm.expect(response._links).to.have.property('self'); });
pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error indicates member not found', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('Member not found'); });
pm.test('Status code is 201 Created', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
const response = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Member can re-enroll after cancellation', function () { const testClassId = pm.collectionVariables.get('testClassSessionId'); const enrolledClasses = response.registeredClasses.filter(c => c.classSessionId === testClassId && c.enrollmentStatus === 'ENROLLED'); pm.expect(enrolledClasses.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });
pm.test('Status code is 404 Not Found', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
const response = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Error indicates enrollment not found', function () { pm.expect(response.message).to.include('Enrollment not found'); });
